field_sources.default: not directly measurable on current hardware
field_sources.real_ack: SEND followed by ACK or timeout

uart_commands.note: ACK is a dongle-to-PC event, not a PC command

latency_policy.ack_match_rule: ACK dst equals current target; seq is recorded but not required to match

routing_params.graph_display: undirected visual presentation; routing calculation keeps directed src_to_neighbor edges
routing_params.node_route_storage: nodes do not store a fixed gateway route; paths are task-scoped
routing_params.weak_link_recording: RSSI below -85 is kept in raw logs but excluded from Dijkstra

commands.matrix_mode: source in sources, target in nodes-source
commands.two_send_latency_policy: first SEND gateway->source, second SEND gateway->source->target; point_to_point_ms=second_ack_ms-first_ack_ms
